signals.raw:
Pectra Upgrade Enters Final Testing Phase Amid ETH Price Surge to $6K | YES | MED confidence**  
Ethereum (ETH) has surged to $6,000 as of April 18, 2026, driven by the **Pectra (Prague-Electra) Upgrade** reaching its final testing phase, boosting wallet abstraction and validator efficiency, alongside record Spot Ethereum ETF inflows and Layer 2 TVL milestones.[1]

signals.headline: Raptors PG Immanuel Quickley ruled out for Game 1 vs
signals.raw:
Raptors PG Immanuel Quickley ruled out for Game 1 vs. Cavaliers due to hamstring strain | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Immanuel Quickley, who injured his hamstring in the regular-season finale against the Nets, has been officially ruled out for tonight's NBA Playoffs Game 1 at Cleveland (scheduled for 1:00 pm ET), with Jamal Shead starting in his place.[4][5]
